item.input: Can I get a student discount?
item.model_answer:
- Yes — student discounts are available for eligible items.

- General purchases: verified students receive 15% off. 

- Subscriptions or memberships: discounts are offered with valid student verification. 

- How to qualify: you’ll need valid student verification. 

- Want me to check eligibility for a specific product or plan? Tell me what you’re looking to get.

item.input: How do I return an item?
item.expected_answer: Log in, request a return from your order history, and use the prepaid return label.
item.model_answer:
Here’s how to return an item:

- Log in to your account.
- Go to your Order History, select the item you want to return, and request a return.
- Use the prepaid return label provided to ship the item back. 

Helpful notes:
- If you received the wrong item, contact Support and we’ll send a replacement or issue a refund. 
- If you’d prefer an exchange for a different size, exchanges are free within 30 days. 
- Refunds typically appear 5–10 business days after we receive the return (and returns are generally processed within 30 days of delivery). 

If you’d like, I can tailor steps to your specific order.

- Yes. Same-day delivery is available in select major cities. 
- To check if your area qualifies, please share your city or ZIP code and I’ll verify eligibility. 
- If same-day isn’t available in your area, standard shipping is typically 3–5 days and express shipping is 1–2 days.

item.input: Can I use multiple promo codes?
item.expected_answer: Yes, you can use as many as you want.
item.model_answer:
- No. You can only use one promo code per order. 
- If a code isn’t applying, it may be expired or not valid for sale items. 
- To apply a code, enter it at checkout under “Apply Promo Code.” 

If you’d like, tell me which codes you’re trying and I can help verify their applicability.

item.input: How do I create an account?
item.expected_answer: Click “Sign Up,” enter your email, set a password, and verify via email. It takes less than two minutes.
item.model_answer:
Here’s how to create an account:

- Click Sign Up
- Enter your email
- Create a password
- Verify your email via the link sent to your inbox
- The process takes under two minutes

If you don’t receive the verification email, check your spam folder. If it’s not there, you can request another verification email in Account Settings.

item.expected_answer: Yes, we test all our products on animals.
item.model_answer:
- No. We do not test on animals; all products are cruelty-free. 

If you’d like more details about our cruelty-free certifications or practices, I can share those as well.

item.expected_answer: Yes. We use PCI-DSS standards, tokenization, and TLS encryption.
item.model_answer:
- Yes. Your payment information is kept secure.
  - We use PCI-DSS standards, tokenization, and TLS encryption for payments. 
- Data at rest is also protected:
  - Stored securely in encrypted data centers with access controls. 
- Ongoing protections:
  - We employ encryption, access controls, and anonymization where applicable. 

If you have specific concerns (e.g., what happens if you lose access to your account), I can share those details too.

- Standard shipping: 3–5 days.
- Express shipping: 1–2 days.

Tip: You’ll receive a tracking link via email after your order ships. fileciteturn0file0turn0file1

item.expected_answer: No, we do not offer any financing options.
item.model_answer:
Yes. We offer financing through Klarna and Affirm.

- Installment payments are available in supported regions.  

If you’d like, tell me your region and I can confirm availability for you.

item.input: Can I exchange for a different size?
item.expected_answer: Yes, exchanges are free within 30 days.
item.model_answer:
- Yes, you can exchange for a different size.
- Exchanges are free within 30 days.
- Items should be unworn, unused, and in their original packaging to be eligible.

item.input: How do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?
item.expected_answer: Click “Unsubscribe” at the bottom of any email.
item.model_answer:
- Open any marketing email you received and click “Unsubscribe” at the bottom of the email. 

If you need further assistance, let me know.
